## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss blog performance, content strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance needs deeper analysis, focusing on US-generated leads (only 10 out of 37 total leads in May)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Current blog-to-lead conversion rate is very low (5,500 clicks to 37 leads)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Competitive analysis reveals opportunities to optimize content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Upcoming VivaTech event presents immediate content creation opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance and Analytics

  - [Published 21 articles last week, reaching 430 total articles](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [May stats: 46-55 blogs published, 5,500 clicks, 2 million impressions, 37 leads (10 US)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Highest performing blog: "Firework integration for Shopify" (136 clicks, 13 leads)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Need to analyze US-specific data and performance of March/April published articles](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Content Strategy Optimization

  - [Focus on quality over quantity (10 blogs/week may be too many)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Analyze top-performing competitor blogs for insights](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Consider experimenting with competitor blog topics (3-4 per week)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Explore adding more CTAs to improve conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Competitive Analysis

  - [Analyzed websites of Salesify, Bazaar Voice, and Syndigo for traffic and content insights](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Firework's authority score higher than some competitors](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Competitors focusing on top-of-funnel content (e.g., "Complete guide to UGC")](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

### Upcoming Events Content

  - [Create content for VivaTech (largest tech conference in France)](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Develop blogs linking Firework to VivaTech, leveraging event keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Explore "moment marketing" opportunities for timely content](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create US-specific content strategy focused on lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Analyze and report on March/April blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Develop summary of top 10 competitor blogs, starting with UGC-related content](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Publish VivaTech-related blogs early next week](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)
  - [Prepare comprehensive research on US leads generated over past 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Identify successful blog topics and similar content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/_cNt1p7Vs85xqZCFrqgpy4FNxHKYTvpJ?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
